first_start_message: Welcome to BHYG! This is a beta version.
please_login: Please login with Bilibili account before proceeding
qr_code_generate_failed: Failed to Generate the QR Code

error_occurred:
Errors Detected:
Please contact the developer with logs and TraceId: {trace}
select_sku_not_complete: Ticket information selection not completed, please return to the last page
beta_ver_info: Current Version: Beta. Not the final quality of the game (?)
unsupported_order_type_warining: WARNING: Only standard projects are supported. Discounts and group orders are currently unsupported.
policy_not_allow_start: BHYG is not allowed to be launched under the current policy.
select_pay_money: Please confirm the amount of the order (denomination, manually modify if you have complex tickets, such as preferences, freight, etc.)
apply_permission_failed: Failed to apply for this permission: {message}
id_type_taiwan: Mainland Travel Permit for Taiwan Residents
apply_beta_ver_success: Application for permission of the test version has been sent
apply_beta_ver_failed: Failed to send the application for the test version
id_type_hk_macau: Mainland Travel Permit for Hong Kong and Macao Residents
select_buyer_not_complete: Buyer selection not completed. Please return and select again
have_sales_dates_msg: Date selection is available for this item
pay_money_automatically_updated: Order amount has been automatically updated to {pay_money} (in cents)
not_recommend_exit_force: FRIENDLY REMINDER: We do not recommend closing the program by directly clicking the exit button in the top-right corner. This may prevent the application from clearing its cached data, which can eventually fill up your temporary disk space. To exit properly, please select 'Exit' from the main menu or use Ctrl + C.
timezone_recommended: We recommend using UTC+8 (Asia/Shanghai) time zone to avoid unnecessary problems
not_allow_run_app: You are not allowed to run this application. Please contact ziantt@ziantt.top for inquiries
follow_confirm: Please follow ZianTT on Bilibili Nya~
follow_success: Followed successfully! Thanks for following me, Nya~
old_follower: You followed me for a long time or we followed each other! Giving you special permissions Nya~
gaia_sms_mo_info: Please use {tel} to send message {content} to {sms_mo_tel}
gaia_biliword_not_supported: biliword gaia not supported, you're on your own now
gaia_type_not_supported: This risk control verification type is not supported
ready_to_sale: Prepare to run the main program (no timer will be available)
sale_start_time_not_found: No starting time for ticket sale, please pay attention to the starting time on your own.
gaia_img_verify_code: Please enter the CAPTCHA code displayed in the image
sale_not_started_warning: WARNING: You have not yet billed the current show. Making the order may prevent the account from buying it within five minutes of billing for this item. Please confirm whether to continue !!!!!
no_buyer: No purchaser information, add in Bilibili HYG
change_order_interval_warning:
WARNING: Please note that the following operations may cause problems, such as an increase in the probability of risk control. We only recommend that you modify this value if you are under these cases:
1. For the start of the process (continuous operation for not exceeding  1 minute)
2. When frequent 5-second waiting events are detected (no additional delay needed)
3. When multiple BHYGs share one IP (multiply this value accordingly)
Make sure that you want to modify the value. We recommend 300ms.
confirm_to_order: Please confirm the information. The process will start soon(countdown available)
restart_required: You need to restart to add new users
switch_account_success: Your account was successfully switched. Please make sure to reconfigure the ticket buyer!
buyer_uid_not_match: The purchaser's UID does not match. This may be caused by switching users. Please reconfigure
bark_enhanced: Whether to enable the augmentation mode (when enabled, DND mode and mute will be ignored, with the maximum volume to repeat the alarm)
ob11_token: OneBot v11 key (leaving blank is available)
bark_server: Bark server (Set default if no special needs)
run_command_command: Please enter a command to be run
run_command_help:
Warning: Please make sure you know what you are doing. This feature is intended for advanced users only.
Please add commands that are compatible with your operating system. You may choose to include the predefined ORDER_ID in your commands; the software will automatically replace it with the actual order number.
change_bgm_sound_path: Change the BGM for ticket snatching
not_allow_lottery: Event Reward function is not allowed to be used
hot_project: Hotspot-marked Projects, may be companied with stricter risk controls
hot_project_gen_token_warning: Hotspot-marked Projects, you do not have permission to simulate the relevant risk control parameters, which carry a high probability of triggering risk control or subsequent settlements
hot_project_no_token: Hotspot-marked project, no related risk control parameters generated, with a high probability of triggering risk control or subsequent settlements
qrcode_generate_failed: Failed to display the QR Code, complete payment with your phone: {error}
scan_qrcode_to_pay: Please scan QR code or complete payment with your phone
config_version_mismatch: Configuration version mismatched, reconfiguration is recommended
session_not_found: No matching login information found, please login again
loading_policy_from_local: Bypass file detected, loading configuration information from local...
request_failed: Request failed due to network reasons: {message}
sentry_unavailable: Unable to connect to the Sentry server. Please check network connection
sentry_banned: The current policy does not allow you to run when you are not connected to the Sentry server
maybe_violated: You are using pirate BHYG, the official version of BHYG: https://github.com/biliticket/BHYG
wait_10s: The program will be automatically exit after 10 seconds.
blacklist_project: The project is not allowed to be bought under current BHYG
captcha_not_available: CAPTCHA is not available in current event
captcha_project_not_set: Project is not set and cannot use verification code
super_mode_v2_on: Super Mode V2 has been started
no_permission_to_solve_captcha: You do not have permission to automatically solve CAPTCHA
captcha_mock_confirm: Whether to make a CAPTCHA simulation
cc_start: Current runtime configuration is as follows:
cc_timedelta: 时间偏差: {timedelta} 秒, 如偏差过大请人工校准，BHYG 不负责调整 (当前时间: {current_time} 秒)
cc_timedelta_warning: WARNING: There is a time deviation, which may result in inaccurate time creation of the order. If this deviates too much, manually go to the system to set calibration.
switch_use_prepare: Toggle whether Prepare Logic is used (default recommends no)
cc_saledelay: 开票后操作开始延时: {delay} 秒
change_after_sale_begin_delay_prompt: Delay in milliseconds after changing the bill, default is 0ms
status_code_meaning: Type of status code meanings parsing
status_code_meaning_content:
Type of status code parsing:
: order successful
- 114514: BHYG internal reserved status code, generally network fault
412: too fast due to a single IP request speed,
-401: GAIA global wind control
412: APIGW rate limit
100001: rarely seen at this time,
900001: Order verification shield (1 second) limits or punishes shield
90000002: Order verification shield controls
10009: Order verification layer out of
10009: stock out of
100041: order ordered in advance, 900001 Punishment
100044: A new version of the code
3: order creation shield (5 seconds) blocking
221: order creation layer controls will trigger order creation of shield
219: order creation failure will trigger order creation shield
super_mode_set_ip_not_support: The specified IP is not supported under Super Mode
select_changfan_id_bind_type: Please select field product name type
select_changfan_id_bind_type_prompt: Since we are unable to confirm the real name requirements of the field, please manually confirm and select the type of the actual name (document number and document document has the same effect).
